## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Atto and explore potential partnership fit.](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atto seeks comprehensive growth support, particularly in paid lead gen, content marketing, and channel optimization](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-driven content creation (10 articles/week) with expert team oversight](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K for 2-month strategy sprint, $12K/month for 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Atto to evaluate fit by month-end; GrowthX's focus on organic content may not fully align with Atto's multi-channel needs](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Topics

### Atto's Growth Needs

  - [Field service workforce management solution (time tracking to payroll)](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Seeking to optimize current campaigns and expand reach](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Focus areas: paid lead gen, content marketing, channel optimization](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [60% of customer base in construction industry](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Previously worked with siloed agencies (SEO, paid, content); now in-house but seeking scale](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end AI-powered content partner](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [2-phase partnership: 2-month strategy sprint + 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Daily publishing (\~10 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Expert team: Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Dedicated Slack channel and weekly planning](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Focus on organic growth via editorial content (not paid ad optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [AI workflows for efficient, accurate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Emphasis on AI search intent (4.4x more likely to convert than traditional search)](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Technology

  - [Deep initial strategy work: customer personas, market analysis](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [AI-driven content creation workflow: brief, research, drafting, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Internal platform with code-based workflows (hundreds of automated steps)](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Integration of visuals (charts, images) in content](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Fact-checking against third-party sources with confidence scoring](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Engine (business travel): 42 articles published in 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Town (fintech): Specialized tax content with cross-linking](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Ramp: Vendor directory leveraging internal spend data](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [AugmentCode: 10x traffic increase (5K to 60K monthly) in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K fixed fee](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Growth execution: $12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Approximately $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [4-6 week queue for strategy sprint kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Publishing starts around week 4-5 of strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Etnik to review additional materials shared post-call](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Atto to evaluate fit with their multi-channel growth strategy by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [GrowthX open to follow-up call or email/Slack communication for questions](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Potential follow-up at end of month to assess Atto's decision on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/nU6dfKqV8FKVGsz6irVkaNcBVFiVz3WR?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
